params.name: sysparm_query
params.description: An encoded query string to filter results.

params.name: sysparm_fields
params.description: A comma-separated list of field names to include in the response.

params.name: sysparm_limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return.

params.name: sysparm_offset
params.description: Starting record index for pagination.

params.name: sysparm_display_value
params.description: Controls the format of field values in the response.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of normal change requests. Supports query filtering, field selection, and pagination.

info.name: Servicenow Create a Normal Change Request

params.name: sysparm_fields
params.description: A comma-separated list of field names to include in the response.

params.name: sysparm_display_value
params.description: Controls the format of field values in the response.

items.docs: Creates a new normal change request. Normal changes require full assessment and approval before implementation.

info.name: Servicenow Retrieve a Normal Change Request

params.name: sys_id
params.description: The unique system identifier for the change request.

params.name: sysparm_fields
params.description: A comma-separated list of field names to include in the response.

params.name: sysparm_display_value
params.description: Controls the format of field values in the response.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific normal change request by its sys_id.

info.name: Servicenow Update a Normal Change Request

params.name: sys_id

params.name: sysparm_fields

params.name: sysparm_display_value
params.description: Controls the format of field values in the response.

items.docs: Updates fields on an existing normal change request.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of standard change requests. Standard changes are created from pre-approved templates.

info.name: Servicenow Create a Standard Change From a Template

params.name: standard_change_template_id
params.description: The sys_id of the standard change template to use for creating the change request.

items.docs: Creates a new standard change request based on a pre-approved standard change template. The template sys_id determines the default values and pre-configured approvals.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of emergency change requests. Emergency changes bypass normal approval processes for urgent situations.

info.name: Servicenow Create an Emergency Change Request

items.docs: Creates a new emergency change request for urgent changes that cannot wait for standard approval processes.
